assertions: D2: Physical database write operations are completely isolated within fahem_sandbox database.

The layout remains fully intact and responsive, with all navigational elements and the "Interactive Knowledge Library" module properly aligned. The "Welcome to Fahem Sandbox" modal sits correctly over the main dashboard, indicating that the system is functioning as a clean, controlled environment for audit and demonstration purposes. All visual components are accurately rendered and appropriately placed.
